word: H6890 - צֶרֶת הַשַּׁחַר - Tsereth hash-Shachar - tseh'-reth hash-shakh'-ar - Zareth-shahar

sections.paragraph:
צרת השּׁחר - tsereth hashshachar - tseh'-reth hash-shakh'-ar

From the same as H6889 and H7837 with the article interposed; splendor of the dawn; Tsereth hash Shachar, a place in Palestine: - Zareth-shahar.
